title: Specialised Committee on issues related to the implementation of the Protocol relating to the Sovereign Base Areas of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland in Cyprus: agenda, 3 July 2025
body: "This page provides the agenda for the sixth Specialised Committee on issues related to the implementation of the Protocol relating to the Sovereign Base Areas of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland in Cyprus.  The agenda lists the topics and activities to be covered during the meeting. "
